/home/dev/deployment.yml.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app-staging
  namespace: staging
  labels:
    app: web-app
    environment: staging
    team: platform
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
      environment: staging
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
        environment: staging
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: nginx
          image: nginx:1.25-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "100m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
        - name: app
          image: registry.devpolaris.dev/web-app:staging-latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 3000
          env:
            - name: NODE_ENV
              value: staging
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              value: postgres://db-staging.internal:5432/webapp
            - name: REDIS_URL
              value: redis://cache-staging.internal:6379
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "200m"
            limits:
              memory: "256Mi"
              cpu: "500m"
